title: Android App Development (Java / Kotlin)
description: This course teaches students how to build Android applications using Java and Kotlin. Participants will learn Android Studio, UI design, database integration, and app publishing on the Play Store. The program includes real-world projects to help students understand mobile app development from basic to advanced levels.
skills: Java Programming, Kotlin Basics, Android Studio, UI Design, API Integration, Firebase, App Debugging
requirements: Basic programming knowledge is helpful but not mandatory, laptop with internet connection, interest in mobile app development
curriculum: Android Development Basics, Java/Kotlin Programming, Android Studio Setup, UI Layout Design, Activity & Fragments, API Integration, Firebase Database, Final Mobile App Project
quizzes: Module based quizzes and coding challenges
assignments: Simple calculator app, note taking app, API based application, final Android project

title: Flutter App Development
description: Learn cross-platform mobile application development using Flutter and Dart. This course teaches how to create high-performance apps for both Android and iOS using a single codebase. Students will build real-world applications and understand UI design, state management, and API integration.
skills: Flutter Framework, Dart Programming, UI Development, API Integration, State Management, App Deployment
requirements: Basic programming knowledge, laptop with internet connection, interest in mobile application development
curriculum: Introduction to Flutter, Dart Programming Basics, Flutter Widgets, UI Design, Navigation & Routing, API Integration, State Management, Final Mobile App Project
assignments: To-do app, weather application, mobile UI design project, complete Flutter app

title: React Native Mobile Development
description: This course focuses on building mobile applications using React Native. Students will learn how to create cross-platform apps for Android and iOS using JavaScript and React. The course includes practical projects and industry-based application development.
skills: JavaScript, React Native, Mobile UI Development, API Integration, Navigation, Firebase Integration
requirements: Basic knowledge of JavaScript and React is recommended, laptop with internet connection
curriculum: React Native Basics, Mobile UI Components, Navigation System, API Integration, Firebase Authentication, Mobile App Development Project
assignments: Mobile login system, API based mobile app, complete React Native project

title: Machine Learning Fundamentals
description: Understand machine learning algorithms and how to build predictive models.
curriculum: Supervised Learning, Unsupervised Learning, ML Models

title: Cloud Computing with AWS
description: Learn cloud computing concepts and Amazon Web Services including EC2, S3, and cloud deployment.
curriculum: Cloud Basics, AWS Services, EC2 Setup, Storage Management, Deployment

title: DevOps Engineering
description: Learn DevOps tools and processes such as CI/CD pipelines, Docker and cloud deployment.
curriculum: DevOps Basics, Docker Containers, CI/CD Pipeline, Deployment

title: Blockchain Development
description: Learn blockchain fundamentals and build decentralized applications.

title: Game Development with Unity
description: Learn how to create games using Unity and C# programming.
curriculum: Unity Basics, Game Physics, Game Design

title: Database Management with SQL
description: Learn relational database concepts and SQL queries for managing data.
curriculum: Database Basics, SQL Queries, Joins, Database Design

title: Big Data Analytics
description: Learn big data technologies and data analysis techniques.
curriculum: Big Data Basics, Hadoop Ecosystem, Data Processing

title: Artificial Intelligence Basics
description: Learn the fundamentals of artificial intelligence and intelligent systems.
curriculum: AI Basics, Neural Networks, AI Applications

title: Ethical Hacking
description: Learn ethical hacking techniques and security testing.
curriculum: Hacking Basics, Security Tools, Penetration Testing

title: Linux System Administration
description: Learn Linux operating system administration and server management.
curriculum: Linux Basics, Shell Commands, Server Setup

title: Software Testing & QA
description: Learn software testing techniques including manual testing and automation basics.
curriculum: Testing Basics, Test Cases, Automation Basics

title: Graphic Design
description: Learn graphic design using tools like Photoshop and Illustrator.

title: Content Writing
description: Learn professional content writing for blogs, websites and marketing.
curriculum: Writing Basics, SEO Content, Blog Writing
